allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "where cargo 2>nul && echo found || echo not found")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Dancy Naik\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe'")
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "POST /api/projects without token: HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"test"}' http://localhost:3000/api/projects)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Fake Bearer token: HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer thisisnotavalidtoken" http://localhost:3000/api/projects)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "No Bearer prefix: HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Authorization: Basic dXNlcjpwYXNz" http://localhost:3000/api/projects)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh config credentials --server http://localhost:8080 --realm master --user admin --password admin)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh create realms -s realm=devkarm -s enabled=true)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh create clients -r devkarm -s clientId=devkarm-web -s publicClient=true -s 'redirectUris=["http://localhost:5173/*"]' -s 'webOrigins=["http://localhost:5173"]' -s rootUrl=http://localhost:5173)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh create users -r devkarm -s username=testuser -s email=test@devkarm.io -s enabled=true -s 'firstName=Test' -s 'lastName=User')
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh set-password -r devkarm --username testuser --new-password test123 --temporary false)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh set-password -r devkarm --username testuser --new-password test123)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec devkarm-keycloak-1 /opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh get users -r devkarm -q username=testuser)
